name: claudex
description: 8 harness commands for Claude Code and Codex: /harness (6-agent build pipeline with Diagnostician), /harness-docs (5-agent documentation), /harness-review (5-agent code review + git), /harness-team (parallel multi-worker build with full Refiner-equivalent), /harness-qa (functional QA with Playwright, 8 test modes), /harness-lint (structural consistency checker), /design (3-dial frontend design), /claude-dashboard (statusline). 25 specialized agent prompts with Meta-Harness-inspired evidence traces, cumulative history, and pre-commit lint hook.
